subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This handmaiden among Thy handmaidens hath been drawn by the fragrant breaths of Thy holiness, and been set ablaze with the fire of Thy love, and hath sought refuge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امة من امائک انجذبت بنفحات قدسک و اشتعلت بنار محبتک و استجارت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness
